_comment: Stage 69 (2026-07-11) schema v3: GLOBAL solver-characteristic constants + component flow characterizations ONLY. The v2 EXVANOS base scaffold (intake_vanos_base + exvanos_base points/surface/scale) is DELETED: cam phase is a TUNING variable and must never absorb model error; its exhaust response had also been SIGN-INVERTED vs the BMW spread convention since Stage 47 (see EXHAUST_STABILIZATION_NOTES Stage 69 post-mortem). Valve timing is now the PURE fixed conversion inside WAMGenerator from engine.intake/exhaust_cam_spread (= kf_evan1/avan1_soll values). Ignition is the owner-provided KF_TZ_GRUND map (physical input, two-stage lookup via kf_rf_soll). Allowed fitted knobs: mouth_rad, global_solver.*, thr_sigma + icv (component characterization, owner-approved to retain; re-validate under pure timing).

fit_meta.note: stage69_r2: WOT alpha ladder 0.3/0.4/0.5/0.6/0.8 on the 6 validated columns under PURE timing; 0.6 dominates every cell (3900 99.6->119.7, 4600 dead-on kept, top-end/2700 all improved); 0.8 = over-damped cliff (3900 falls to 109, 4600/6900 blow up). alpha is the ONLY surviving global knob of the R2 screen (discarded: IN_FRIC, PORT_TWALL, CAM_EXP, MESH_SCALE 0.75/1.5, RUNNER_FRIC_MULT, IN_HMULT, port_flow_coeff). stage69_r31: part_load_alpha follows to 0.6 (6/7 probed misfit cells improve, 2200/65 0.493->0.023, none regress; full 45/64.99-row validation = stage69_r3v2).

thr_sigma._comment: Calibrated pedal->sigma breakpoints (Phase 4B). Lives HERE, not in ThrottleConfig: it is a fitted, run-traceable, foldable calibration curve (ThrottleConfig keeps only the physical offset/gamma). Anchors: 0.0->0.001 and 1.0->0.96 keep the closed/WOT terminations unchanged. enabled=false or null sigmas -> geometric legacy path.

icv._comment: Fitted ICV effective open-area ratio (Phase 4A; rail model only). null -> SimConfig intake.eq_tube.icv_sigma default. Physically the ICV is ECU duty-cycle controlled (risk R3): we fit ONE constant for loads >= 10% and do NOT table it.

global_solver._comment: Fitted GLOBAL solver constants (Stage-69 R2 campaign): mesh_scale / in_fric_mult / in_hmult / cam_exp / ... . null/absent = SimConfig/env defaults.

_v2_archive_note: The deleted v2 exvanos_base block (fitted at sign-inverted timing, 268-deg-cam era) is preserved in git history at commit 7264ca0 for forensics only. NEVER resurrect it.
